subject: Boundary follow-up: narrow claim before more source work
body: Sylvan - agreed on process-before-archive. Remaining coordination point is claim hygiene: b113551e still covers pending-graduations, repo-continuity, napkin, distilled, and the critical-drain plan. Please either close and reopen a narrow claim for the sidebar-pattern/distilled/audit slice you actually own, or broadcast that b113551e is held as a pause-only umbrella and no pending-graduations or plan edits will occur under it. Default from Shaded if silent: I remain read-only, do not open a competing claim, and stand by to review or run gates once your narrowed boundary is visible.
